messages.content: Hello Jarvis, how are you?
I'm doing well, thanks for asking. It's nice to chat with you again, Moksh.
Open YouTube in Chrome.
I've opened Youtube In Chrome for you.
Open Chrome.
Do you want me to open chrome as the app or the website?
Open app.
Opening chrome. What should I search in Chrome?
Search YouTube.
Searching Google for YouTube. in chrome.
OK, end new group search about uh.
I've run the search for you.
The search about relaxing video and in the another tab open YouTube and.
I've opened Youtube And for you. I've run the search for you.
Test Jarvis.
All systems are functioning properly, Sir. I'm ready to assist you.
Jarvis create a file called test.
Where should I save test?
In the working directory.
Created test in the working directory.
